Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks 116 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. OpenRocket 516 upvotes, 89 comments
  3. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 276 upvotes, 57 comments
  4. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 238 upvotes, 50 comments
  5. Autoresearch for SAT Solvers 104 upvotes, 20 comments
  6. Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code 152 upvotes, 35 comments
  7. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 257 upvotes, 66 comments
  8. Czech Man's Stone in Barn's Foundations Is Rare Bronze Age Spearhead Mold 38 upvotes, 6 comments
  9. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 50 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. An x86-64 back end for raven-uxn 29 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. RX – a new random-access JSON alternative 73 upvotes, 23 comments
  12. Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989) 918 upvotes, 431 comments
  13. Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) 172 upvotes, 74 comments
  14. A sufficiently detailed spec is code 263 upvotes, 133 comments
  15. Framework doesn't matter 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  16. Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends 71 upvotes, 29 comments
  17. Warranty Void If Regenerated 298 upvotes, 168 comments
  18. LotusNotes 56 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. What’s on HTTP? 55 upvotes, 24 comments
  20. The math that explains why bell curves are everywhere 112 upvotes, 63 comments
  21. Show HN: Pano, a bookmarking tool built around shareable shelves 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root 123 upvotes, 75 comments
  23. Nvidia NemoClaw 290 upvotes, 206 comments
  24. We Have Learned Nothing 40 upvotes, 21 comments
  25. Mozilla to launch free built-in VPN in upcoming Firefox 149 81 upvotes, 57 comments
  26. What 81,000 people want from AI 89 upvotes, 67 comments
  27. OpenAI Has New Focus (on the IPO) 215 upvotes, 187 comments
  28. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 496 upvotes, 557 comments
  29. Show HN: Browser grand strategy game for hundreds of players on huge maps 19 upvotes, 12 comments
  30. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 219 upvotes, 277 comments

Last generated 4:00pm, 19 March 2026. Source here.
